# The SEO Rulebook (auto-generated, self-updating)

Corpus: **23626** graded pages · authority-controlled band n = 67 top-3 / 153 challengers. Regenerated every run; verified verdicts come from the audit.

> **No entry is a proven RULE yet.** LEAD = survives authority control (audit-verified or significant). CONFOUND = vanishes at equal authority. WATCH = right direction, not yet significant. GATE = flat floor. A lead becomes a rule only after a controlled live test moves a real page — see [[experiments]].

**Audit-verified leads: 2 · candidates to watch: 5 · confounds ruled out: 8.**

| Factor | Verdict | Basis | Raw gap | Controlled gap | n | If real, do this |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Internal links to the page | **LEAD** | audit-verified | 3.0 | 14 | 67 | Add internal links pointing at the target page from elsewhere on the site. |
| Topical breadth (keywords the page ranks for) | **LEAD** | audit-verified | 7 | 15.0 | 56 | Build out the related cluster so the page covers the whole topic, not one term. |
| Has FAQ schema | **WATCH** | low | 1% | 3% | 67 | Add an FAQ block with schema. |
| Has freshness date | **WATCH** | low | 4% | 8% | 67 | Show a published/updated date. |
| Lists (ul/ol) | **WATCH** | low | 1.0 | 2 | 67 | Add structured lists. |
| Query in lead paragraph | **WATCH** | low | 9% | 10% | 67 | Use the query in the opening lines. |
| Title 40-60 chars (truncation-safe) | **WATCH** | audit-verified | 6% | 11% | 67 | Trim/expand the title into the 40-60 character band. |
| Page speed (mobile LCP) | **GATE** | audit-verified | 217.6 | -1125.0 | 15 | — |
| E-E-A-T score | **CONFOUND** | medium | 0.0 | 0 | 67 | — |
| Exact query in title | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 9% | 12% | 67 | — |
| Freshness (page age, days) | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | -1 | -67.5 | 49 | — |
| Has author / byline | **CONFOUND** | medium | 0% | 13% | 67 | — |
| Keyword density /1k | **CONFOUND** | medium | 0.0 | 0.0 | 51 | — |
| Query front-loaded in title | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 6% | 5% | 67 | — |
| Stat / $ density | **CONFOUND** | medium | 0.0 | 0 | 67 | — |
| Word count / depth | **CONFOUND** | audit-verified | 49.5 | 116 | 67 | — |
| Contextual (in-content) internal links | **NO DATA** | low | — | — | 0 | — |

## The playbook (confirmed leads first — these are what to test live)

1. **Internal links to the page** — Add internal links pointing at the target page from elsewhere on the site.
2. **Topical breadth (keywords the page ranks for)** — Build out the related cluster so the page covers the whole topic, not one term.

**Watch list (promising, need more data or an audit):** Has FAQ schema, Has freshness date, Lists (ul/ol), Query in lead paragraph, Title 40-60 chars (truncation-safe).

_The authoritative verdicts are set by the six-skeptic `verify-page1-leads` audit and recorded in VERIFIED here + [[findings-log]]. This screen surfaces new candidates between audits._
